dict.string: on alfred_script(q) activate application "SystemUIServer" tell application "System Events" tell process "SystemUIServer" -- Working CONNECT Script. Goes through the following: -- Clicks on Bluetooth Menu (OSX Top Menu Bar) -- => Clicks on SX-991 Item -- => Clicks on Connect Item set btMenu to (menu bar item 1 of menu bar 1 whose description contains "bluetooth") tell btMenu click tell (menu item "Michael’s AirPods" of menu 1) click if exists menu item "Connect" of menu 1 then click menu item "Connect" of menu 1 return "Connecting..." else if exists menu item "Disconnect" of menu 1 then click menu item "Disconnect" of menu 1 return "Disconnecting..." else click btMenu -- Close main BT drop down if Connect wasn't present return "Connect menu was not found, are you already connected?" end if end tell end tell end tell end tell end alfred_script

on alfred_script(q) activate application "SystemUIServer" tell application "System Events" tell process "SystemUIServer" -- Working CONNECT Script. Goes through the following: -- Clicks on Bluetooth Menu (OSX Top Menu Bar) -- => Clicks on SX-991 Item -- => Clicks on Connect Item set btMenu to (menu bar item 1 of menu bar 1 whose description contains "bluetooth") tell btMenu click tell (menu item "Stark’s Bose Headphones" of menu 1) click if exists menu item "Connect" of menu 1 then click menu item "Connect" of menu 1 return "Connecting..." else if exists menu item "Disconnect" of menu 1 then click menu item "Disconnect" of menu 1 return "Disconnecting..." else click btMenu -- Close main BT drop down if Connect wasn't present return "Connect menu was not found, are you already connected?" end if end tell end tell end tell end tell end alfred_script
